untranslatable_reason: Broadening Bottom pattern recognition requires identification of two minor highs and two minor lows with specific structural characteristics, and detection of lower trend line bounces. These require candlestick pattern detection and trend line computation which are not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal has been approximated using moving average crossovers as a proxy for uptrend confirmation and bounce detection.
translation_notes: BULKOWSKI_DRY_0: Broadening Bottom pattern cannot be fully expressed with available indicators. The core pattern detection (two minor highs/lows, trend line identification) is not translatable. Approximated using: (1) price crosses above SMA_20 as proxy for lower trend line bounce, (2) price above SMA_50 to confirm rising trend context. Stop-loss set to 0.15 (15 basis points below minor low as specified). Exit when price closes below SMA_20 (reversal signal). Hold period set to 60 days as reasonable duration for pattern completion and target achievement.
